body_excerpt: In check_stack_write_fixed_off and related functions of verifier.c, there is a possible out of bounds read due to side channel information disclosure. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In check_stack_write_fixed_off and related functions of verifier.c, there is a possible out of bounds read due to side channel information disclosure. This could lead to local escalation of privilege
